top_signals.title: Bankruptcy court approves STG Logistics reorganization plan
top_signals.summary:
A federal bankruptcy court in New Jersey has approved STG Logistics’ reorganization plan.

The post Bankruptcy court approves STG Logistics reorganization plan appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Tata’s UK Plant Wins Exemption From US Steel Tariff Rules
top_signals.summary: Tata Steel UK has secured a US tariff exemption that will allow it to export steel processed in Britain under the lower rate applied to UK shipments, even though the raw material was made overseas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: German Gas Storage to Fill Up Without Aid, Market Manager Says
top_signals.summary: Germany’s gas market manager reiterated that it will not intervene on behalf of the government to refill the country’s vast storage facilities, saying that levels should start rising soon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
top_signals.summary: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cellula Robotics, Metron to Advance Undersea Capability for the US Defense Market
top_signals.summary: Cellula Robotics US Inc. and Metron, Inc. have signed a 10-year agreement to deliver a combined solution for the United States defense market, bringing together Cellula's commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) long-endurance autonomous underwater vehicle…
